text:
The Other Side of the Gate is the 49th episode of the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series.

Synopsis

The confrontation with the leader of the homunculi sends Ed to a place that could shatter his entire understanding of alchemy: the other side of the Gate.

Trivia

This episode shares its Japanese name with the second ending for the 2003 Fullmetal Alchemist series, To the Other Side of the Door.
